'''Evax''' was a fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] who served as an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]<ref name="CCG" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="SWE" /> he became a leader in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], having a proven track record for predicting [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] movements, and his coordination of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] maneuvers saved many vulnerable bases.<ref name="CCG" />

In 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Evax was aboard the Imperial [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], where Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attacked the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] over the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Space station/Legends|station's]] subsequent destruction.<ref name="SWE" /> Evax wore the standard white [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|uniform]] for Imperial Intelligence members, with a [[Rank insignia plaque/Legends|rank insignia plaque]] adorned with three blue and three amber tiles.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Evax was created for the [[1996]] ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
